meaning: adj.可接受的,可信任的,公认的,质量合格的
examples: Only accredited journalists were allowed entry.
The Arabs are usually accredited with the discovery of distillation.
This degree programme is fully accredited by the Institution of Electrical Engineers.
These are for accredited investors only, but most people really worried about wealth protection will qualify.
In recent interviews, Dr. Kumar said a government hospital in Mumbai would be accredited soon.
